channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK lift capacity limits may not reflect rising average body weights, raising safety concerns
item.description: Experts have raised concerns about lift safety across the UK, arguing that current capacity limits may no longer reflect the average weight of passengers. Research presented at the European Congress o...

item.title: Rising housing costs force young Australians to delay first home ownership
item.description: Young Australians are increasingly taking years to save enough for their first home, highlighting ongoing affordability challenges in the housing market. The article follows Kriti and Vivikth Narayana...

item.title: How Your Chronotype Can Influence the Benefits of Exercise
item.description: Research increasingly shows that the time of day we exercise can impact the health benefits we gain. This is largely influenced by an individual's chronotype – their natural preference for activity an...

item.title: Current status and public health measures of the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak
item.description: The recent hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has been managed effectively, though risks remain. While hantavirus infections occur globally, this outbreak is notable because it involves a cruise shi...

item.title: Republicans Investigate Sam Altman’s Investments Amid Questions About Trump Family Finances
item.description: Republican lawmakers are investigating whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman violated conflict-of-interest laws through his personal investments, while reportedly overlooking financial dealings of the Trump f...

item.title: Sidney Crosby to Represent Canada at World Hockey Championship in Switzerland
item.description: Sidney Crosby, the captain of the Pittsburgh Penguins, will once again represent Canada at the Men's World Hockey Championship in Switzerland. This marks Crosby's fourth appearance at the tournament a...

item.title: Vincent Shares His Doubts About Matthew With Stella in 'The Alibi' Episode 40
item.description: In Episode 40 of 'The Alibi,' the storyline intensifies as Vincent finally opens up to Stella about his lingering doubts regarding Matthew. The episode explores the growing tension and emotional compl...

item.title: Nollywood Actor Alexx Ekubo Dies After Battling Kidney Cancer
item.description: Popular Nollywood actor Alexx Ekubo has passed away at the age of 40 after a prolonged battle with kidney cancer. Ekubo, known for his charm, acting talent, and charismatic personality, had been absen...

item.title: Mystery Jets Release New Single ‘Black Sage’ After Six-Year Hiatus
item.description: After a six-year hiatus, Twickenham band Mystery Jets have returned with a new single, ‘Black Sage’, marking the start of a fresh chapter for the group. Their previous album, 'A Billion Heartbeats', w...

item.title: Deputy President Kindiki to Represent Kenya at Museveni's Inauguration in Kampala
item.description: President William Ruto has appointed Deputy President Kithure Kindiki to lead Kenya's delegation to the inauguration of Ugandan President Yoweri Kaguta Museveni in Kampala. This move signals Kenya’s s...

item.title: Trump confident US can resolve Iran conflict as Iran consolidates control over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated on May 12, 2026, that he does not foresee needing China’s assistance to resolve the ongoing war with Iran, despite a fragile ceasefire and escalating tensions in the r...

item.title: Nikita Shulchenko strengthens lead in Tour of Luzon ahead of Stage 14 Baguio finish
item.description: PANGASINAN, Philippines – Russian cyclist Nikita Shulchenko of LCW UAE Cycle continues to dominate the 2026 Tour of Luzon as he solidifies his lead in the individual general classification (GC) with o...

item.title: Kaduna State Prepares As KASU Lecturers Threaten Strike Over Unmet Demands
item.description: The Academic Staff Union of Universities (ASUU), Kaduna State University (KASU) branch, don yan say dem fit go on strike if the state government no meet their demands before end of May 2026. According...

item.title: Man charged after teen found injured and confined in Saskatchewan motel
item.description: A 22-year-old man from Turtleford, Saskatchewan, has been charged after a teenage girl was discovered seriously injured and locked in a motel bathroom in North Battleford. The Royal Canadian Mounted P...

item.title: House of Representatives to investigate alleged digital blackmail operations
item.description: A member of the Philippine House of Representatives has called for an official inquiry into the rise of so-called 'digital blackmail outfits' that pose as media platforms or commentary outlets. Repres...

item.title: Residents Raise Alarm As Newly Built Mokwa Culvert Shows Cracks
item.description: People for Mokwa area dey worry well well as the newly constructed culvert wey suppose replace the old Mokwa Bridge don start to show cracks and dey weaken. The government approve ₦16.7 billion for re...

item.title: Experts Warn Affordable Housing Investment May Affect Kenya's Long-Term Economic Growth
item.description: Nairobi — Economic analysts have raised concerns that Kenya's big push in the Affordable Housing Programme might affect the country's long-term growth. The report, 'The Kenyan Economy Through a Hayeki...

item.title: Saccawu raises concerns over Pick n Pay's proposed restructuring and impact on workers
item.description: The South African Commercial Catering and Allied Workers Union (Saccawu) has raised concerns over Pick n Pay’s recent decision to initiate a section 189A consultation process, which could result in la...

item.title: Finalists Named for Jim Gregory NHL General Manager of the Year Award
item.description: The NHL has announced the finalists for the 2025-26 Jim Gregory General Manager of the Year Award, honouring outstanding leadership in team management. Bill Guerin of the Minnesota Wild, Chris MacFarl...

item.title: Service Workers in Hoedspruit Struggle with Inadequate Housing After Fire
item.description: In Hoedspruit, a small tourist town along the R527, around 120 people are living in abandoned vendor stalls after losing their homes in a fire at the Plastic View informal settlement in November 2025....
